recommendations.title: Slave of the Cannibal God
recommendations.overview: A woman and her brother fly to New Guinea to look for a lost expedition, led by her husband, which has vanished in the great jungle.

recommendations.title: Torso

recommendations.title: Occhio, malocchio, prezzemolo e finocchio
recommendations.overview: The film is divided into two episodes, The Hair of Disgrace and The Magician, both focusing on the theme of the occult and beliefs. The title translates as "Eye, Evil Eye, Parsley and Fennel".

recommendations.title: L'allenatore nel pallone 2

recommendations.title: Your Vice Is a Locked Room and Only I Have the Key
recommendations.overview: Oliviero is a drunk, burned-out writer who amuses himself by hosting orgies at his grand country manor and humiliating his wife Irina. When a number of women are murdered in grisly fashion, Oliviero becomes a prime suspect.

recommendations.title: All the Colours of the Dark

recommendations.title: The Strange Vice of Mrs Wardh

recommendations.title: Pelé: Birth of a Legend
recommendations.overview: The life story of Brazilian football legend, Pele.

recommendations.title: Remember the Titans

recommendations.title: Summer of '92
recommendations.overview: The 1992 Danish football team competes for the European Championship.
